scripts.build: node --check bootstrap.js && node --check server.js && node --check foundation/api-contract.js && node --check foundation/config.js && node --check foundation/cors.js && node --check foundation/gateway.js && node --check foundation/request-context.js && node --check foundation/supabase-adapter.js && node --check foundation/session-customer-mutations.js && node --check foundation/transitional-api.js
scripts.test: node --test foundation/api-contract.test.js foundation/config.test.js foundation/request-context.test.js foundation/gateway.test.js foundation/transitional-api.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test
